data.title: Sales growth at atNorth reflected in new appointments: Camilla O'Leary as Director of Client Management, Director of Hyperscale Sales, and Sales Director in Norway.
data.description: AtNorth, a prominent company in Reykjavik, Iceland, made significant organizational changes on October 10, 2025. Camilla O'Leary, the Sales Director, was promoted to the Director of Client Management. Moreover, the company introduced two new sales positions - a Director of Hyperscale Sales and another Sales Director stationed in Norway. These strategic adjustments aim to enhance the company's sales department and strengthen its presence in the Nordic region.

data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on October 10, 2025, Bybit, ranked as the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, unveiled the latest Bybit x FXStreet TradFi Report. data.title: Happiest Minds Technologies enhances insurance operations at MUA Insurance with Agentic AI, Oct 10, 2025.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India, on October 10, 2025, Happiest Minds Technologies Limited revealed the implementation of its Agentic AI solution. The company, listed on the NSE under the ticker symbol HAPPSTMNDS and on the BSE under the same symbol, is recognized for its AI-driven digital engineering and Mindful IT services.
